steps.title: Identify the initial condition and rate of change
steps.content:
When the line closes at $t = 0$, there are 238 people in line. Each minute, 14 people board the ride and leave. This means:
  • Initial value at $t = 0$: $p(0) = 238$
  • Rate of change (slope): $-14$ people per minute (negative because the number decreases)

steps.title: Write the linear function
steps.content:
With initial value 238 and slope $-14$, the linear function is:
$$p(t) = -14t + 238$$
Check: at $t = 1$, $p(1) = -14(1) + 238 = 224 = 238 - 14$, confirming exactly 14 people departed in the first minute. That matches choice A — A is correct.
